purpose: Verification-only integration story: exercise the real, already-landed S1/S2/S4 producers (inviteLinkStorage, joinFlow's approveJoinRequestImpl, notifications' inviteExpirySweep + unreadStore) against the six order/concurrency-sensitive whole-flow invariants (AC-INV-1..6) declared in architecture.md's '## Order-Sensitive Composition' section. Owns no production code and introduces no new production seam — it proves the composition of existing seams, and escalates any invariant that fails against real code as a finding for the owning story rather than patching it here.
